description: Write and execute a Gretl hansl script to perform multivariate outlier detection on the 'food.gdt' dataset (located in default gretl data or ~/Documents/gretl_data/food.gdt). The script should calculate the squared Mahalanobis distance for the variables 'food_exp' and 'income' into a new variable 'm_dist' and create a binary variable 'is_outlier' using a threshold of 5.991. Save the resulting dataset with these new columns to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/food_with_outliers.csv.
